content:
🔥 opencode | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide developers with an AI-powered coding assistant through a user-friendly interface, streamlining the development process.
✨ Key Features: • Open-source AI coding agent • Command-line interface (CLI) • Desktop application (BETA) • Multiple installation methods (curl, npm, scoop, choco, Homebrew, pacman, AUR, mise, nix) • Customizable installation directory
📖 Summary: OpenCode is an open-source AI coding agent designed to assist developers. It provides a command-line interface and a desktop application for seamless integration into development workflows, offering AI-powered coding assistance.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
